deepDive.title: Neuron-Aware Data Selection for Annotation-Free LLM Self-Distillation
deepDive.summary: This paper is a inference systems lead from the research stream. Post-training large language models (LLMs) without real-world interaction feedback or human-labeled supervision remains challenging, particularly in specialized domains where expert annotations are costly to obtain. It gets the longer read because the public context is source-grounded and the item is close to the systems layer.
